notes: bytes.hex is the MarmotNostrRoutingUpdateV1 payload, not the AppDataUpdate proposal wrapper.

The update payload is a full replacement state (MarmotNostrRoutingUpdateV1 = MarmotNostrRoutingV1): it carries the 32-byte nostr_group_id followed by the new relays<V>, in the Marmot canonical encoding.
This example changes the relay list to a single relay while keeping nostr_group_id; an update MAY also change nostr_group_id (a routing rotation).
The update is a full replacement state and begins with nostr_group_id[32]; it is decoded by the same codec as the state vector.
